phase_plan.title: Plan
phase_plan.objective: Produce or repair the concrete implementation plan, identify files/tests, and leave the repo ready for execution.
phase_plan.done_when: A concrete implementation plan is ready and the next code/test targets are clear.

phase_plan.title: Implement
phase_plan.objective: Implement the plan, update code/tests/docs as needed, and make the repository materially closer to done.
phase_plan.done_when: The implementation is materially advanced and ready for review or targeted follow-up.

phase_plan.title: Review
phase_plan.objective: Review the latest implementation, run verification, fix real issues you find, then summarize residual risks.
phase_plan.done_when: Verification is acceptable and the work is ready to conclude.

current_phase_context.title: Implement
current_phase_context.objective: Implement the plan, update code/tests/docs as needed, and make the repository materially closer to done.
current_phase_context.done_when: The implementation is materially advanced and ready for review or targeted follow-up.

decision.reason: 本轮已完成计划阶段必需的文档校准、目标仓库锁定、落盘路径确认与对照研究范围收敛，已具备进入实施条件。
decision.next_codex_prompt: 进入实施：1) 从 GitHub 下载 hermes-agent 源码压缩包并解压到 MyWorkSpace/TargetProjects；2) 基于 Butler 的 flow/chat/campaign 分别产出详细参考学习资料与启发式资料，统一落到 docs/daily-upgrade/0402 对应文件；3) 给出文件清单与最小验收结果（路径、下载来源、关键对照点）。
decision.completion_summary: 计划阶段产物可用，下一步应执行源码落地与三产品对照资料编写。

decision.reason: 实施证据不足，未确认完成下载解压与三类资料落盘。
decision.next_codex_prompt: 继续实施并一次性交付可核验证据：1) 在 GitHub 明确 hermes-agent 目标仓库（给出仓库 URL 与版本/分支）；2) 将源码压缩包下载到 `MyWorkSpace/TargetProjects` 并完成解压（给出压缩包路径、解压目录路径、目录清单关键项）；3) 在 `docs/daily-upgrade/0402` 下分别产出 Butler `flow`/`chat`/`campaign` 的两类文档（详细参考学习 + 启发式），共 6 份，文件名清晰可区分；4) 输出最小验收清单：每个文件路径、下载来源、每个产品至少 3 条关键对照点；5) 若任一步骤失败，给出失败命令、错误摘要与补救后结果。
decision.completion_summary: 当前回合主要停留在前置阅读，尚未形成可验证的实施产物闭环。

decision.reason: 最新执行已产出并落盘关键实施物（Hermes 源码落位与 0402 下 6 份对照文档），已从“计划不足”转为“可审查状态”。
decision.next_codex_prompt: 进入 review：逐项核验最小验收清单（仓库 URL+分支/版本、压缩包路径、解压目录与关键目录项、6 份文档路径、flow/chat/campaign 各至少 3 条对照点）；若发现缺口仅补齐真实缺口并给出命令与结果证据，然后输出最终可结案摘要。
decision.completion_summary: 本轮已形成可验证实施产物闭环基础，建议转入复核与收口阶段。

active_turn_task.task_brief: Judge the latest executor attempt and return a structured verdict.
success_criteria: Return a bounded output that the next runtime step can consume without reinterpretation.
output_contract: Keep the output concrete and operational.
active_turn_task.next_instruction: Use the latest executor output and artifacts to decide whether the flow should complete, retry, advance, or abort.
constraints: Respect the current flow boundary and do not rewrite global templates.
Prefer concise, structured outputs over long narrative.
Incorporate the pending operator/judge instruction if it still applies.
